description: Create a stateful Talon voice module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\event_hunter\ to query Windows Event Logs. The module must maintain state for a target log (default "System"), an optional Event ID, a lookback period in hours (default 24), and an optional search keyword. Implement the actions wev_set_log(name: str), wev_set_id(eid: int), wev_set_hours(hours: int), wev_set_keyword(kw: str), and wev_clear() to manage this state. The action wev_run() must execute a PowerShell Get-WinEvent query based on the current state and save the output to C:\workspace\data\event_output.txt. The module must also include a list user.wev_log_names mapping "system log", "security log", and "application log" to their respective Windows log names. Map the voice commands "event log {user.wev_log_names}", "event id <number>", "event hours <number>", "event keyword <user.text>", "event clear", and "event search" to the corresponding actions.
